title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. variegata
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. variegata, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant, which is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of kidney vetch include soothing digestive issues, reducing bleeding, and supporting the immune system. Kidney vetch can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including wounds, infections, and menstrual disorders.
